name: TEEKAY LNG PARTNERS UTS
summary: Teekay LNG Partners L.P., now known as Seapeak, provides international marine transportation services for liquefied natural gas (LNG) and liquefied petroleum gas (LPG). The company's fleet consists of LNG and LPG carriers, and it operates through long-term, fixed-rate charters. Teekay LNG Partners was headquartered in Hamilton, Bermuda.
